name: OUSD (Origin Dollar)
description: Rebasing stablecoin backed by USDC via Vault strategies

name: crvUSD (Curve USD)
description: CDP stablecoin with LLAMMA soft-liquidation, multi-market collateral

name: USDD (Decentralized USD)
description: MakerDAO-fork stablecoin backed by TRX/USDT vaults and HTX Smart Allocator

name: syrupUSDC (Maple)
description: ERC-4626 share over Maple's institutional open-term lending pool

name: syrupUSDT (Maple)
description: ERC-4626 share over Maple's institutional open-term lending pool, USDT-denominated. Sister product to syrupUSDC.

name: apxUSD (Apyx)
description: RWA-backed synthetic stablecoin (non-yield) over Strategy STRC + cash + SATA. Sister product apyUSD captures yield. Pairs cross-link.

name: apyUSD (Apyx)
description: ERC-4626 yield-bearing wrapper around apxUSD. Captures STRC dividend pass-through; 30-day cooldown on canonical exit, DEX two-hop for retail.

name: USDm (Mento Dollar)
description: Reserve-backed fiat stablecoin from Mento V3. Multi-chain (Celo home, Monad spoke). Live API-driven backing; on-chain ReserveV2 sanity check on Monad.

name: thUSD (Theo Network)
description: Yield-bearing onchain dollar from Theo Network. Backed by thBILL @ NAV (T-Bill exposure) plus stables, plus an off-chain gold-carry leg. Two-token: thUSD ($1-pegged) + sthUSD (yield-bearing vault share, currently ~5.5% APY).
